row_count: Full file: 2006–2024. In-scope rows after year filter and null-year drop: 2014=17038, 2015=30729, 2016=10957, 2018=17005, 2022=21932. Full file contains null-year rows — drop on load.
missing_fields: vote_share (multi-member ward design — null for all but highest-vote party candidate; 14-31% null by year); electorate (4-9% null in LEAP years); turnout_percentage (4-8% null in LEAP years); GSS (0.2% null in 2016 only)
anomalies: ONE FILE covering 2006-2024. Uploads were filtered slices for size only — pipeline reads full file, filters to {2014,2015,2016,2018,2022}. ENCODING: UTF-8-BOM — use encoding='utf-8-sig'. Drop null-year rows on load (present in full file). data_source_era: 2014/2015=leap_only (LEAP only); 2016=dc_leap (DC-LEAP); 2018/2022=dc_leap (DC+DC-LEAP). Boundary is 2016 not 2019. vote_share ONLY for highest-vote party candidate in multi-member wards — FI must derive from votes_cast/turnout_valid for all candidates. ENP pre-computed (=1/sum(VS^2)) — use as Phase 8 QA cross-check only, compute FI independently. party_id joins to EC_Ref1 in party_coding.csv (NOT MergePartyID). 3 unmatched party_ids: NR_Ind/NR_IndLR=IND; joint-party:15-64=EC_Ref2 join (Civic ILP). Comma in votes_cast: 1 case (Sunderland/Pallion 2018: '1,251'). GSS uses most-recent codes retroactively — Dec 2016 lookup matches only 60-72% of training GSS; use Dec 2018 lookup for GSS join. tier field = DCLEAPIL authority tier (Unitary/Lower/Upper), NOT civic-lens Tier 1/2/3. type field = party type (Major/Minor/Independent/Localist etc.), never authority type.
authoritative_or_supplementary: Authoritative — sole source for 2014/2015/2016/2018 baseline; cross-check for 2022
notes: Load: pd.read_csv(path, encoding='utf-8-sig', low_memory=False). Filter to required years. Drop null-year rows. Apply data_source_era by year. See DCLEAPIL_v1_0_Party_coding.csv for party standardisation.

anomalies: SCHEMA BREAK vs 2021/2022 — different sheet names and all column names. CRITICAL: Yorkshire Tier 3 councils absent — Commons 2025 covers CC/UC only. Only MB = Doncaster. Two turnout measures: EC method (Ballots/Electorate) and HoC method (valid votes/electorate) both as ratios (0-1) — choose HoC method for consistency with 2022. Ballots field new (total including invalid). Party coverage reduced to 6 parties + Other aggregate — FI must use candidates sheet not ward sheet. 277 wards have non-zero 'Other' (max 3055 votes).

notes: PIPELINE STATUS CHANGE (March 2026): Not loaded in pipeline. No in-scope metro or London boroughs held elections in May 2025 (county council fallow year for by-thirds metro districts). Only Calderdale (West Yorkshire) held ward-level elections — single borough insufficient for generalisable calibration. Calibration chain revised to 2014→2018→2022; 2025 data not required. File retained in data/raw/ for provenance. See DECISIONS_LOG.

anomalies: Reference only. Key findings: vote_share in multi-member wards given only for highest-vote party candidate; ENP = 1/sum(VS^2) pre-computed (identical to FI formula); GSS uses most-recent code regardless of election year; top_vote = ward maximum vote, not candidate vote; turnout_valid = sum of all votes_cast (valid only, excluding invalid ballots).
notes: Reference document. Not loaded in pipeline.
